title: Service of notice
doc_html:
Art. 1976.  Service of notice

Notice of the motion for new trial and of the time and place assigned for hearing thereon must be served upon the opposing party as provided by Article 1314.
doc_text:
Art. 1976.  Service of notice
Notice of the motion for new trial and of the time and place assigned for hearing thereon must be served upon the opposing party as provided by Article 1314.
